subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify French words used in English

sections.heading: Examples
sections.content:
French is one of the European languages that have developed out of Latin. Some French expressions are used in English.
/nExamples include:
/ná la carte → menu listing with prices
á la mode → fashionable
bourgeoisie → middle class
chef → senior cook
communiqué → official announcement
déjà vu → seen before
fiancé → man engaged to be married
malaise → uneasy feeling
gauche → socially clumsy
précis → summary
RSVP → repondez s’il vous plait (please reply)
